ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being monitored */,
  "bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits in the metric */,
  "initial_hex" TEXT /* Initial hexadecimal value of the metric */,
  "rw_flag" TEXT /* Read/Write flag indicating access type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., CPU, GPU, Memory) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cycles, instructions, MB) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., sensor, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark the category as active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the value was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value of the performance metric */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware component */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the value (e.g., average, max, min) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_values_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES hardware_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., CPU, GPU, Memory) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the component was installed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_metrics" (
  "component_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware component */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being monitored for the component */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark the association as active or inactive */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_metrics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES hardware_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Secure hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark the user as active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view metric, add metric) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert event */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware component */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "is_acknowledged" INTEGER /* Flag to mark the alert as acknowledged or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES hardware_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric for which the threshold is defined */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware component */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of the threshold (e.g., absolute, percentage) */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert triggered by the threshold (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES hardware_components ("component_id")
)
